servers.name: filesystem
servers.description: Read/write vault files. Required for all tiers.

servers.name: email
servers.description: Send and draft emails via Gmail. Required for Silver+.

servers.name: browser
servers.description: Browser automation via Playwright. Used for WhatsApp watcher (Silver+).

_instructions: Copy this file to .claude/mcp.json and enable the servers you need.
Set all path variables in your .env file.
Never put credentials directly in this file.
